problem id: 06698d4e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(1)

examples:
  10100000 -> 01010000
  00001111 -> 00000111
  00101000 -> 00010100
  10110110 -> 01011011
  00101100 -> 00010110
  11011110 -> 01101111
  00000110 -> 00000011
  11011011 -> 01101101

query: 01100100
predicted answer: 00110010
